'''鈭歜-s-ng''' ('''kabasang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:aken|aken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aken|aken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-s-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kabasang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibasang|thibasang]] || [[word:jibasang|jibasang]] || [[word:shibasang|shibasang]] || [[word:kibasang|kibasang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubasang|thuthubasang]] || [[word:jujubasang|jujubasang]] || [[word:shushubasang|shushubasang]] || [[word:kukubasang|kukubasang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubasang|thubasang]] || [[word:jubasang|jubasang]] || [[word:shubasang|shubasang]] || [[word:kubasang|kubasang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubasang|thubasang]] || [[word:jubasang|jubasang]] || [[word:shubasang|shubasang]] || [[word:kubasang|kubasang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebasang|thebasang]] || [[word:jebasang|jebasang]] || [[word:shebasang|shebasang]] || [[word:kebasang|kebasang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobasang|thothobasang]] || [[word:jojobasang|jojobasang]] || [[word:shoshobasang|shoshobasang]] || [[word:kokobasang|kokobasang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasang|thobasang]] || [[word:jobasang|jobasang]] || [[word:shobasang|shobasang]] || [[word:kobasang|kobasang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasang|thobasang]] || [[word:jobasang|jobasang]] || [[word:shobasang|shobasang]] || [[word:kobasang|kobasang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙basang|th忙basang]] || [[word:j忙basang|j忙basang]] || [[word:sh忙basang|sh忙basang]] || [[word:k忙basang|k忙basang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabasang|thathabasang]] || [[word:jajabasang|jajabasang]] || [[word:shashabasang|shashabasang]] || [[word:kakabasang|kakabasang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabasang|thabasang]] || [[word:jabasang|jabasang]] || [[word:shabasang|shabasang]] || [[word:kabasang|kabasang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabasang|thabasang]] || [[word:jabasang|jabasang]] || [[word:shabasang|shabasang]] || [[word:kabasang|kabasang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabasang|shabasang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabasang|goshabasang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabasang|gokishabasang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabasangn眉|shabasangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabasangnkn眉|goshabasangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasangn眉|gokishabasangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabasangsh毛|shabasangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabasangnksh毛|goshabasangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabasangsh毛|gokishabasangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasangro|shabasangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasangnkro|goshabasangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasangro|gokishabasangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasangmu|shabasangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasangnkmu|goshabasangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasangmu|gokishabasangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabasangsher|shabasangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabasangnksher|goshabasangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabasangsher|gokishabasangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabasang|shabasang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabasangnkng|goshabasangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabasang|gokishabasang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabasangya|shabasangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabasangnkya|goshabasangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabasangya|gokishabasangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabasangyam|shabasangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabasangnkyam|goshabasangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabasangyam|gokishabasangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasangn眉sh毛|shabasangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasangnkn眉sh毛|goshabasangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasangn眉sh毛|gokishabasangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasangn眉ro|shabasangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasangnkn眉ro|goshabasangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasangn眉ro|gokishabasangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasangn眉mu|shabasangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasangnkn眉mu|goshabasangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasangn眉mu|gokishabasangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasangsh毛n眉|shabasangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasangnksh毛n眉|goshabasangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasangsh毛n眉|gokishabasangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasangsh毛ro|shabasangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasangnksh毛ro|goshabasangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasangsh毛ro|gokishabasangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasangsh毛mu|shabasangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasangnksh毛mu|goshabasangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasangsh毛mu|gokishabasangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasangron眉|shabasangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasangnkron眉|goshabasangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasangron眉|gokishabasangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasangrosh毛|shabasangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasangnkrosh毛|goshabasangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasangrosh毛|gokishabasangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasangromu|shabasangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasangnkromu|goshabasangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasangromu|gokishabasangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasangmun眉|shabasangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasangnkmun眉|goshabasangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasangmun眉|gokishabasangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasangmush毛|shabasangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasangnkmush毛|goshabasangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasangmush毛|gokishabasangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasangmuro|shabasangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasangnkmuro|goshabasangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasangmuro|gokishabasangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
